name: codex-english-buddy
description: English language coach for Codex users: translate Chinese prompts, correct English prompts, and track learning reports.

interface.shortDescription: English coaching, writing review, and language stats for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex English Buddy brings passive English coaching to Codex: prompt translation, English correction, prompt refinement, writing review, recurring-mistake reports, drills, and Codex prompt/session hooks.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR description for English quality.
Refine this rough prompt with English Buddy.
